hero.title:
We build
what endures.
hero.sub:
Proprietary assets from the protocol layer
to the user interface.

aegis.label: AEGIS
aegis.title: Absolute protection
aegis.desc: From Greek αἰγίς — the divine shield of Zeus and Athena. Aegryn covers and protects its assets against all threats.

aegir.label: AEGIR
aegir.title: Mastery of flows
aegir.desc: From Old Norse Ægir — god of the sea, master of invisible currents. Aegryn orchestrates digital value flows between its assets.

aeon.label: AEON
aeon.title: Timeless durability
aeon.desc: From Greek αἰών — eternity, an immense era. Direct alignment with "Engineered to Last" — we build what will stand the test of time.

assets.title: Our proprietary ecosystem.
assets.sub: Six proprietary assets. One common house.

advisory.strip: Aegryn Advisory — We protect what you build

hero.title: Protecting what you build.
hero.desc: Cybersecurity protocols, AI auditing and digital strategy for companies that refuse to be vulnerable.

cyber.title: Cybersecurity
cyber.desc: Attack surface identification, infrastructure hardening and incident response.

ai.title: AI Audit & Trust
ai.desc: We audit your models, pipelines and decision processes to guarantee reliability and compliance.

strategy.title: Digital Strategy
strategy.desc: Alignment between your digital ambitions and European and Swiss regulatory constraints.

approach.title: A rigorous protocol, not a promise.
approach.desc: Every engagement starts with exhaustive diagnostics before any recommendation. We document, measure, and deliver.

steps.label: Diagnostic
steps.desc: Complete mapping of your digital exposure and identification of critical risks.

steps.label: Protocol
steps.desc: Development of a prioritised treatment plan tailored to your sector and constraints.

steps.label: Execution
steps.desc: Implementation with continuous monitoring and transparent reporting at each milestone.

steps.label: Hardening
steps.desc: Final documentation, skills transfer and access to post-mission follow-up.

hero.label: What We Build
hero.title: Six assets. One vision.
hero.desc: Every Aegryn asset is designed to dominate its vertical — from enterprise AI to transaction networks, from lifestyle to housing.

nexoris.desc: Modular artificial intelligence platform for enterprises demanding reliability, compliance and data sovereignty.

kryolio.desc: Digital and crypto asset management network — portfolio, performance tracking and automated strategy.

lyvra.desc: Premium lifestyle super-app for subscription management, digital concierge and personalised experience.

vorrex.desc: Secure peer-to-peer transaction network with integrated compliance protocols for European markets.

domify.desc: Intelligent real estate platform combining search, AI valuation and rental management for the Swiss and European market.

fleetori.desc: Next-generation fleet management and logistics solution for urban mobility companies.

philosophy.label: Our philosophy
philosophy.title: Proprietary. Sovereign. Durable.
philosophy.desc: We do not build MVPs. We do not sell minority stakes to VCs. Every Aegryn asset is designed to be fully owned, sovereignly operated and passed on to the next generation.

advisoryCta.text: Does your business need institutional-grade digital protection?

hero.label: About Aegryn
hero.title: Swiss Tech Asset Builder
hero.desc: We design, build and operate digital ecosystems — from bold ideas to reliable, enduring technology. Engineered in Switzerland. Built to last.

vision.label: Our vision
vision.text: We believe technology should do more than impress. It should structure, simplify and elevate everyday experiences. In a world filled with fragmented apps and short-term solutions, we build coherent digital ecosystems — environments where users, data and transactions connect naturally and securely.

create.title: We create
create.desc: Solutions that anticipate your needs as individuals or professionals, ensuring seamless digital interactions that enhance everyday life.

simplify.title: We simplify
simplify.desc: Eliminate complexity by integrating smart automation, intuitive interfaces, and interconnected systems, making technology effortless and efficient.

embrace.title: We embrace
embrace.desc: We stay ahead by pioneering innovations, embracing cutting-edge advancements, and setting new standards in seamless digital experiences.

precision.title: Precision
precision.desc: Every decision is documented, measured and traceable.

durability.title: Durability
durability.desc: We build for the long term, not the next funding round.

sovereignty.title: Sovereignty
sovereignty.desc: Our assets, our infrastructure, our data. No critical external dependencies.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Towards our partners, users and the market.

founder.label: The founder
founder.bio1: Yohann Bollack is an entrepreneur, builder and digital strategist. He founded Aegryn with a simple conviction: the best digital assets are born from total mastery of the chain, from idea to infrastructure.
founder.bio2: Passionate about the intersection of technology, security and design, he leads an ecosystem of assets spanning AI, real estate, logistics and social networks.

swiss.title: Our assets. One common house. One Swiss ambition.

hero.title: Let's talk.
hero.desc: Advisory, partnership, press or general enquiry — we respond within 24h.
